notes.title: Evidence boundary
notes.text: Audi UK evidence supports UK model presence. Platform labels are architecture context and do not verify locksmith procedures.

notes.title: Reuse audit
notes.text: No repository claim met the two-source record-level threshold for automatic inheritance.

notes.title: Variant policy
notes.text: Keyed and advanced-key/keyless variants must be verified separately by generation and fitted hardware.
